creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-05-16 18:56:52 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/pecl-mcve      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  pecl-mcve is a Interface for the MCVE/Monetra API
  (libmonetra [formerly libmcve]), allowing you to
  work directly with MCVE/Monetra from your PHP
  scripts. Monetra is Main Street Softworks' solution
  to direct credit card processing for Unix.
  
  WWW:   http://pecl.php.net/package/mcve/
  
  PR:             ports/123665
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3058    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/pecl-mcve/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/pecl-mcve/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/pecl-mcve/pkg-descr (new)
